h1: 13 kg Front Load Washing Machine | ThinQ (Wi-Fi) | Essence White

gallery.a: Front view of LG 13kg Front Load Washing Machine in Essence White (WFN1310WHT)

modules.head: Fit your washer into your life
modules.body: We've fit an XL capacity drum within an LG standard depth footprint of 660mm. Reclaim some space in your home without compromising the size of your wash.
modules.disc: *Save up to 125mm of space compared to previous LG conventional front loader washing machines of 770mm depth.

imgs.a: Slim-depth washer fits neatly into modern laundry spaces

modules.head: Fit more of the good stuff in
modules.body: Get back valuable time to do more of the things you love. With an impressive 13kg XL drum, get large loads done in one. Perfect for big loads and washing bulky items like duvets and bedding at home.

imgs.a: 13kg XL drum handles family-sized loads and bulky bedding

modules.head: Intelligent Fabric Care with AI DD®
modules.body: LG front load washers with AI Direct Drive technology weigh the load and assess fabric softness, then automatically select the optimal wash motion for thorough cleaning and outstanding clothing care.
modules.disc: *Tested by Intertek on June 2023. AI Wash cycle compared to Cotton cycle. Results may vary depending on the clothes and environment.

imgs.a: AI DD senses fabric weight and softness, auto-selecting optimal wash motion

modules.head: Get fresh laundry in just 39 minutes
modules.body: TurboWash™ 360° sprays water in four directions to ensure a deep, thorough clean in a short time — so you can get back to what matters faster.
modules.disc: *Tested by Intertek on May 2023. TurboWash39 cycle with 3kg of IEC load. Results may vary depending on the environment.

modules.head: Limit noise and vibrations
modules.body: Packed with Inverter DirectDrive technology, a vibration sensor and enhanced weight balance for quiet, stable operation — even during high-speed spin cycles.

modules.head: Reduce allergens in fabrics with the Allergy Care™ Cycle with Steam
modules.body: Select the Allergy Care™ Cycle with Steam to help reduce common household allergens including house dust mites, cat, dog and pollen allergens, plus some household bacteria and fungi.
modules.disc: *Allergy Care cycle tested by US Intertek reduces Live Dust Mites, Allergens (Dust Mite, Cat, Dog, Pollen), Bacteria, and Fungi. Results may vary.

imgs.a: Allergy Care with Steam protects sensitive skin and keeps fabrics hygienic

modules.head: Smart control, smart life with LG ThinQ®
modules.body: Start, monitor and control your washer from anywhere via the LG ThinQ® app. Download new cycles, track energy usage, and enjoy hands-free voice control through compatible smart speakers.
modules.disc: *LG ThinQ® app available on compatible Android or iOS devices. Wi-Fi connection and product registration required.

imgs.a: Remote start and control via LG ThinQ app
Monitor cycle status and energy use from anywhere
Hands-free voice control via smart speaker

modules.head: Space-saving design to complement any space
modules.body: Slim standard-depth footprint, premium Essence White glossy finish, stainless steel drum and black tinted tempered glass door — designed to elevate any laundry space.

modules.head: SASO-Certified Efficiency
modules.body: Certified by SASO (Saudi Standards, Metrology and Quality Organization) for energy and water performance in the Kingdom of Saudi Arabia.

specs.v: Dial + Full Touch Buttons & LED Display
